user.title: Toniebox Cloud Login
user.description:
Enter your Toniebox / Boxine account credentials.
Your data is only used to communicate with the official Toniebox cloud (api.tonie.cloud).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Toniebox
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please enter your credentials again.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Toniebox cloud. Please check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Toniebox account is already configured.

upload_audio.name: Upload Audio
upload_audio.description: Upload a local audio file as a new chapter to a creative tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

file_path.name: File Path
file_path.description: Absolute path to the audio file on the Home Assistant host (e.g. /config/tonie_audio/story.mp3).

title.name: Chapter Title
title.description: Title shown for this chapter on the tonie. Defaults to the filename.

clear_chapters.name: Clear Chapters
clear_chapters.description: Remove all chapters from a creative tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

sort_chapters.name: Sort Chapters
sort_chapters.description: Sort the chapters on a creative tonie.

entity_id.name: Creative Tonie
entity_id.description: The media_player entity of the target creative tonie.

sort_by.name: Sort By
sort_by.description: Sort chapters by: title, filename, or date.
